svg.text: McCzarny recently pushed extensive updates to
his `crater-js` game, introducing stamina
mechanics for abilities like teleportation and
climbing, and fixing inventory issues when
switching characters. He enhanced the UI with
character portrait tooltips, visual indicators
for character actions, and implemented
character selection by clicking sprites. New
gameplay features include an "Essence Spider"
mob, ladder functionality with a trading UI,
and various improvements to movement logic like
diagonal digging and path checking. He also
worked on core mechanics such as item dropping,
cave generation, and essence management,
including pickup and initial drops. Further
updates involved adding tooltips for items and
abilities, showing ability progress, and a
significant migration of the project to
TypeScript. Visuals were updated with new tile
textures, icons, and a complete HUD overhaul,
along with environmental elements like falling
boulders and resource drops. For
`flexible-log-analyzer`, McCzarny updated
development dependencies, bumped the project
version to `0.3.10`, and cleaned up local VS
Code settings. He also bumped dependencies in
`upload-image` and adjusted job timing in
`chromium-daily-digest`.
Generated on: Sun Apr 19 03:25:09 2026
